homepage.description: A modern, responsive personal resume website built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to chat? Send me a message!

stayInTouch.successMessage: Thanks! I'll be in touch soon.
stayInTouch.messagePlaceholder: Write a message, ask a question, or just say hi...

techStack.title: Used in this site
techStack.subtitle: Technologies used to build this website

nextjs.name: Next.js
nextjs.description: A React framework that makes building websites faster and easier
nextjs.why: Chosen for its excellent performance and developer experience
nextjs.benefits: Fast page loads, automatic improvements, easy deployment

tailwind.name: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: A styling tool that helps create beautiful designs quickly
tailwind.why: Chosen for rapid development and consistent design
tailwind.benefits: Clean code, responsive design, easy customization

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.description: A language that adds type checking to JavaScript to prevent errors
typescript.why: Chosen to improve code quality and prevent bugs
typescript.benefits: Fewer errors, better autocomplete, more reliable code

markdown.name: Markdown
markdown.description: A simple way to write and format content
markdown.why: Chosen for easy content updates without coding
markdown.benefits: Simple syntax, version control friendly, portable

nextIntl.name: next-intl
nextIntl.description: A tool that translates the website into multiple languages
nextIntl.benefits: Easy translations, automatic language detection, SEO friendly

jest.name: Jest
jest.description: A testing tool that ensures code works correctly
jest.benefits: Fast tests, good error messages, wide adoption

playwright.name: Playwright
playwright.description: A tool that automatically tests the website across different browsers
playwright.benefits: Reliable tests, supports multiple browsers, easy to use

firebase.name: Firebase
firebase.description: A platform that tracks website usage and sends notifications
firebase.why: Chosen for powerful analytics and engagement features
firebase.benefits: Real-time data, easy integration, reliable service

sentry.name: Sentry
sentry.description: A tool that detects and reports errors in the website automatically
sentry.benefits: Quick issue detection, detailed reports, real-time alerts

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.description: A hosting service that makes the website fast and available worldwide
vercel.why: Chosen for excellent performance and automatic deployments
vercel.benefits: Global CDN, automatic HTTPS, zero configuration

formspree.name: Formspree
formspree.description: A service that processes contact form submissions
formspree.why: Chosen for simple form handling without a backend
formspree.benefits: Easy setup, spam protection, reliable delivery

storybook.name: Storybook
storybook.description: A tool that documents and tests UI components in isolation
storybook.why: Chosen for better component documentation and development
storybook.benefits: Isolated components, visual documentation, easy testing

githubActions.name: GitHub Actions
githubActions.description: A system that automates testing and deployment when code changes
githubActions.why: Chosen for continuous integration and delivery
githubActions.benefits: Full automation, integrated with GitHub, flexible configuration

sonarqube.name: SonarQube
sonarqube.description: A tool that analyzes code quality and security
sonarqube.why: Chosen to maintain high code quality standards
sonarqube.benefits: Catches bugs early, identifies vulnerabilities, improves maintainability
